supply_chain.dependencies: Single or primary suppliers for silicone hydrogel contact lens components, certain medical devices and IVF products
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain disruptions, raw material shortages, sole supplier dependencies for silicone hydrogel materials, inflation, labor shortages, logistics challenges

regulatory_risks: FDA regulatory requirements and enforcement actions
EU Medical Devices Regulation (MDR) and EU In Vitro Diagnostic Medical Devices Regulation (IVDR) compliance
CLIA certification requirements for laboratory testing
HIPAA and data privacy regulations (GDPR, CCPA)
Anti-kickback laws and physician self-referral prohibitions (Stark Law)
FDA LDT (Laboratory Developed Tests) regulation changes
HCT/P (Human Cells, Tissues, and Cellular and Tissue-Based Products) regulations
Export control and trade compliance laws
Healthcare reform and pricing regulations (Affordable Care Act, Inflation Reduction Act)
State and foreign anti-kickback and false claims laws
Product recall and warning letter risks
Clinical trial and IDE approval requirements
Quality System Regulation (QSR) and cGMP compliance
International economic and trade sanctions laws

sanction_risks: International conflicts and global response to conflicts affecting supply chains and market access
Economic and trade sanctions compliance (OFAC, UN Security Council)
Tariffs enacted by Chinese government on U.S. goods
